'''SD-7''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Communications droid/Legends|Communications droid]], serving as assistant to [[IMP-22]]. SD-7's main function was to relay messages from Imperial agents around [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] to a high ranking Imperial [[Commander/Legends|commander]] that IMP-22 and SD-7 served. SD-7 communicated in [[Binary/Legends|droidspeak]].

SD-7 was known to be combat-capable. When in combat mode, the usually-blue diodes on its body turned red. Its legs extended to roughly double their usual length, lifting its body off the ground, and a small [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] extended from beneath the main body. The blaster appeared to have a full 360 degree firing arc.

Typically, its armaments were used as a method to deal with traitorous or incompetent commanders.
